page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC757.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 4 credits.

MUSC799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

MUSC800 Advanced Seminar in Music Pedagogy (3 Credits)

A detailed study of historical and contemporary methods of pedagogy, and analysis of pedagogical problems. Sectioning by instrument. Required of all candidates for the D.M.A. Degree in performance and literature.

Prerequisite: MUSC400; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
